zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford於1333年7月10日出生在英國賀福爾克利福德時，他的父親Robert de Clifford27歲，母親Isabel de Berkeley27歲。他於大約1353年與Maud de Beauchamp在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克沃里克 卡素結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1345年登記服兵役。他於1350年被列為high sheriff of westmoreland。他去世於1389年7月13日在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭恩布利亞沙普聖 瑪麗 馬格達萊也斯 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford于1333年7月10日出生在英国賀福爾克利福德时，他的父亲Robert de Clifford27岁，母亲Isabel de Berkeley27岁。他于大约1353年与Maud de Beauchamp在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克沃里克 卡素结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1345年登记服兵役。他于1350年被列为high sheriff of westmoreland。他去世于1389年7月13日在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰恩布利亞沙普聖 瑪麗 馬格達萊也斯 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford was born on 10 July 1333, in Clifford, Herefordshire, England, his father, Robert de Clifford, was 27 and his mother, Isabel de Berkeley, was 27. He married Maud de Beauchamp about 1353, in Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. He registered for military service in 1345. In 1350, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of westmoreland. He died on 13 July 1389, in Appleby, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in St Mary Magdalene's Abbey, Shap, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Shap Abbey, Cumbria, England: St Mary Magdalene's Abbey, Shap, Cumbria, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford est né le 10 juillet 1333, à Clifford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Clifford, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Berkeley, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Beauchamp environ 1353, à Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1345. En 1350, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of westmoreland. Il est décédé le 13 juillet 1389, à Appleby, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary Magdalene's Abbey, Shap, Cumbria, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford am 10. Juli 1333 in Clifford, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Clifford 27 und seine Mutter Isabel de Berkeley 27. Er hat um 1353 in Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England Maud de Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er hat sich 1345 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1350 ist sein Beruf als high sheriff of westmoreland aufgeführt. Er starb am 13. Juli 1389 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Appleby, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Mary Magdalene's Abbey, Shap, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford è nato il il 10 luglio 1333 nel Clifford, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Clifford, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Berkeley, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Beauchamp circa 1353, nel Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1345. Nel 1350, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of westmoreland. Morì il 13 luglio 1389, nel Appleby, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary Magdalene's Abbey, Shap, Cumbria, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Cliffordが1333年7月10日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクリフォードで生まれた時，父Robert de Cliffordは27歳，母Isabel de Berkeleyは27歳であった。約1353年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックワーウィック カストルでMaud de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1345年に兵役登録をした。1350年，職業はhigh sheriff of westmorelandと記録されている。彼は1389年7月13日にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドアップレビーで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスクウンブリアシャップスト マリー マグダリーネ'ス アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Shap Abbey, Cumbria, England: 영국 잉글랜드 쿠브리아 샤프 스트 메리 막그다렌'스 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford(이)가 1333년 7월 10일 영국 허퍼드실르 클리퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Clifford(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Berkeley(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1353년 영국 워윅실르 워윅 워윅 카스틀에서 Maud de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1345년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1350년, 그의 직업은 high sheriff of westmoreland이었다. 그는 1389년 7월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 애플레비에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 쿠브리아 샤프 스트 메리 막그다렌'스 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford nasceu em 10 de julho de 1333, em Clifford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Clifford, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Berkeley, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Beauchamp aproximadamente 1353, em Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1345. Em 1350, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of westmoreland. Ele faleceu em 13 de julho de 1389, em Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary Magdalene's Abbey, Shap, Cumbria, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Shap Abbey, Cumbria, England: ст мэри магдеилине'с эбби, шап, кумбря, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford родился 10 июля 1333 г. в местности клиффорд, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Clifford было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Berkeley, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Beauchamp около 1353 г. в местности варвикк кастл, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. В 1345 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1350 годуработал по профессии high sheriff of westmoreland. Он умер 13 июля 1389 г. в местности эпплеби, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри магдеилине'с эбби, шап, кумбря, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford nació el 10 de julio de 1333, en Clifford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Clifford, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Isabel de Berkeley, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Maud de Beauchamp aproximadamente 1353, en Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1345. En 1350, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of westmoreland. Murió el 13 de julio de 1389, en Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary Magdalene's Abbey, Shap, Cumbria, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
